tagline: Advanced Care for Your Perfect Smile

doctor.name: Dr. Sarah Jenkins, DDS
doctor.title: Lead Dental Surgeon & Implantologist
doctor.bio: With over 15 years of experience in advanced dentistry, Dr. Jenkins specializes in painless root canals and cosmetic smile makeovers.

services.title: Dental Implants
services.desc: Permanent, natural-looking replacements for missing teeth.

services.title: Teeth Whitening
services.desc: Advanced laser whitening for a brighter, confident smile.

services.title: Root Canal
services.desc: Painless microscopic root canal treatments in a single sitting.

services.title: Invisalign
services.desc: Clear aligners to straighten teeth without metal braces.

testimonials.name: Rahul Verma
testimonials.review: Best dental clinic! The root canal was completely painless. Highly recommended.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.review: Got my teeth whitened here. The staff is very polite and the clinic is extremely hygienic.
